titleStmt.title: SII 37.444: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 444. (A.R. No. E 56 of 1941-42.) Vāḍapalli, Suryapet Taluk, Nalgonda District.

summary.p: On a slab set up outside the temple of Narasiṁhasvāmi.
Sultans of Gōlkoṇḍa: Muhammad Quli Qutub Shah.
This is dated Śaka 1530, Kīlaka, Jyēshṭha, ba. 3, Sunday, corresponding to 1608 A.D., May 22, Sunday, 53.

It records the grant of a village Krottupalli as dēvamānya agrahāra to god Narasiṁhasvāmi for conducting daily offerings and worship and for the maintenance of Rāmānujakuṭam by Talapunūri Kōnappa, who was head of the administration under Malek Amīr-ul-mulk to whom the Pādashah was pleased to grant the sīma of Vajirābād as mokhāsa. On the request of Chintā-Reḍḍi, Basivi-Reḍḍi, Dodda Mādhava Rao and several others who were the Sīmasavudars of Saṅgōji-Boppa-Dēvuṅgāru, the donor is stated to have made the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī narasiṁhāyanamaḥsvasti jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1530 Agu
nēṭi kīlaka saṁvvatsara jyēṣṭa ba 3 Āyattavāramu
nāḍu . hajarati pāduśahāyibu rāhimu
cakrava¨rti putṛlaina mahamaṁddu kuli
pātuśaha gōlakoṁḍa paṭnamaṁddu ratnasiṁhā
hvāsanārūḍhulai pṛdhuvīsakala sāṁmrājya
muṁnnu yēlucuṁnnuṁḍḍi tana dakṣiṇa bhu
juṁḍaina malika Amīrava mulikagārini ma
ra mahāmattu cēśi vajīrābada sīma vōkhasā
dayacēstēnu vilāyati sakala sāṁmrājya
muṁnnu dha¨rma pratipālanatō yēlucuṁnnu
ṁḍḍaṁgānu vāriki vāṇānaku Atiṣṭātulaina . talu
punūri kōnappagāru maḷaya bēḷasu saṁggō
ji bōssadēvuṁggā¨rkki sīmasavuda¨rllu ciṁttāre
ḍḍi basvireḍḍi doḍḍamādhavarāvu mallu Annappase
ṭneni yallappa mayilu vīrappa narra Avubhaḷa
reḍḍi rāmasāni mallapparāmasāni Ayyappa
komire kōnamanēṁḍu tellagō¨rllayallappa stha
lagaraṇālu cennūri sōmarāju kāci
rāju veṁkkaṭṭayyamunu gaṁṭṭi siṁgga
rājuṁnnu vinnapaṁ cēstēnu voḍapalli śrī nṛsiṁhvu
laku nityanaivēdyamahōtsava rāmānuja kū
ṭānaku krottapalli grāmamu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyi
gānu Āgrāmarakamu sīmamīṁda paṁcci vēsu
koni lakṣmīnarasiṁhvulaku dēvamānya Agrahā
raṁgānu sama¨rppiṁstimi . yiṁdduku telaṁgā
lu tappirāyanā . kāśīlō gōbrāṁhmaṇa vadhacē
śina pātakānaṁ bōvuvāru . śrī śrī śrī . śrī
śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
. Ēkaiva bhaginīlōkē
Digital edition of SII 37.444 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
